Commercial Furniture

Custom Restaurant Booths & Commercial Furniture

Our furniture is found in businesses all across the GTA — restaurants, bars, cafés, and lounges you may have already visited. Every piece is custom-built right here in Mississauga at wholesaler pricing with a fast turnaround for your business.

🍽️

Specializing in Restaurant Booths

We specialize in custom restaurant booths used by businesses across the GTA — from small cafés to large bars and dining rooms. Our booths are built tough for high-traffic commercial environments and designed to elevate any space. Chances are you've sat in one of our pieces without even knowing it.

✂️

Any Size, Colour & Material

Every booth and commercial piece is fully custom. Choose your exact dimensions, configuration, fabric, vinyl, or leather — in any colour to match your brand. We accommodate straight runs, L-shapes, U-shapes, curved banquettes, and more. Easy-clean commercial-grade materials available.

💰

Wholesaler Pricing

We sell factory-direct with no retail markup, giving restaurants and businesses the best possible price on premium Canadian-made commercial furniture. Fast turnaround so your business isn't kept waiting — manufactured right here in Mississauga and delivered anywhere in Ontario.

🪡

Reupholstery for Existing Commercial Furniture

Already have commercial booths, banquettes, or chairs that are worn, torn, or just need a fresh look? We offer full reupholstery services for existing commercial furniture. Instead of replacing everything, we restore your current pieces using commercial-grade, easy-clean materials — saving you money while keeping your space looking sharp. Ideal for restaurants looking to refresh their interior without a full renovation.

Get a Quote
